_comment: WO-105 ship spec: no part realizes v1 geometry (sheet enclosure ops outside the realizable set) -- identity BOM with honestly-empty mass + the contract graph. Boards realize no outline inputs; the DSP images carry no caller-held artifact bytes (AD-22) so firmware/hdl are named-absent. WO-105 ship fix: CaseBody realizes no geometry (program not convertible), so it rides the augment-only bom.lines identity row -- the mech step-export family requires RealizedGeometry per assembly row.
